basic_details.job_title: Gauhati High Court – Law Clerk – 3 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Gauhati High Court Law Clerk Recruitment 2026 offers 3 posts including Law Clerk vacancies for candidates possessing Graduate qualification in Law with online applications open from 11 May 2026 to 06 June 2026 on the official website of Gauhati High Court.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Law, Post Graduate in Law, Doctorate in Law

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Gauhati High Court to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
seo_tags: Gauhati High Court Law Clerk Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
